name: Illumina Defender
short_description: Defend the vibrant world of Illumina from descending enemies in this retro-styled, fast-paced, single-player arcade game. Utilize strategic upgrades to keep the city safe and enjoy an electrifying soundtrack while you do it!
detailed_description:
Illumina Defender is an intense, colorful, and strategic arcade game where your mission is to protect the neon-lit city of Illumina from relentless waves of enemies. With its retro aesthetics and electronic soundtrack, Illumina Defender offers a nostalgic yet modern gaming experience.

Gameplay Overview:
Choose from five unique defenders, including a quirky super chicken, each with distinct stats that add a unique twist to your defense strategy. As enemies descend, you’ll need quick reflexes and strategic planning to purchase essential upgrades. Increase your missile stock, boost missile speed, and enhance city health while managing your resources wisely.

Key Features:
  • Vibrant Retro Graphics: Enjoy a vibrant visual experience with neon colors and a retro arcade vibe.
  • Strategic Upgrades: Balance your resources to buy nodes that generate cash, missiles, and city health improvements.
  • Unique Defenders: Select from five different defenders, each offering unique challenges and gameplay styles.
  • Electronic Soundtrack: Immerse yourself in the game with a pulsating electronic soundtrack that complements the action.
  • Replayability: Designed for short bursts of play but with a compelling "one more go" factor that keeps you coming back.
